ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: نٓ‌ۚ وَٱلْقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسْطُرُونَ ١
ayahs.translation: Nūn. By the pen and what they inscribe,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجْنُونٍ ٢
ayahs.translation: You are not, [O Muḥammad], by the favor of your Lord, a madman.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّ لَكَ لَأَجْرًا غَيْرَ مَمْنُونٍ ٣
ayahs.translation: And indeed, for you is a reward uninterrupted.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ ٤
ayahs.translation: And indeed, you are of a great moral character.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَسَتُبْصِرُ وَيُبْصِرُونَ ٥
ayahs.translation: So you will see and they will see.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بِأَييِّكُمُ ٱلْمَفْتُونُ ٦
ayahs.translation: Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil].

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ ٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَنۡ ضَلَّ عَنۡ سَبِيۡلِهٖ وَهُوَ اَعۡلَمُ بِالۡمُهۡتَدِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided.
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa Rabbaka Huwa a'lamu biman dalla 'an sabeelihee Wa-Huwa a'lamu bilmuhtadeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَا تُطِعِ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٨
ayahs.translation: Then do not obey the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَدُّواْ لَوْ تُدْهِنُ فَيُدْهِنُونَ ٩
ayahs.translation: They wish that you would soften [in your position], so they would soften [toward you].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا تُطِعْ كُلَّ حَلَّافٍ مَّهِينٍ ١٠
ayahs.translation: And do not obey every worthless habitual swearer

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَمَّازٍ مَّشَّآءِۭ بِنَمِيمٍ ١١
ayahs.translation: [And] scorner, going about with malicious gossip -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ ١٢
ayahs.translation: A preventer of good, transgressing and sinful,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عُتُلِّۭ بَعْدَ ذَٲلِكَ زَنِيمٍ ١٣
ayahs.translation: Cruel, moreover, and an illegitimate pretender.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَن كَانَ ذَا مَالٍ وَبَنِينَ ١٤
ayahs.translation: Because he is a possessor of wealth and children,

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذَا تُتۡلٰى عَلَيۡهِ اٰيٰتُنَا قَالَ اَسَاطِيۡرُ الۡاَوَّلِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
ayahs.transliteration: Izaa tutlaa 'alaihi aayaatunaa qaala asaateerul awwaleen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَنَسِمُهُۥ عَلَى ٱلْخُرْطُومِ ١٦
ayahs.translation: We will brand him upon the snout.

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَـٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا۟ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَـٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُواْ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ ١٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّا بَلَوۡنٰهُمۡ كَمَا بَلَوۡنَاۤ اَصۡحٰبَ الۡجَـنَّةِ​ ۚ اِذۡ اَقۡسَمُوۡا لَيَصۡرِمُنَّهَا مُصۡبِحِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We have tried them as We tried the companions of the garden, when they swore to cut its fruit in the [early] morning
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa balawnaahum kamaa balawnaaa As-haabal jannati iz 'aqsamoo la-yasri-munnahaa musbiheen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا يَسْتَثْنُونَ ١٨
ayahs.translation: Without making exception.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ ١٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَطَافَ عَلَيۡهَا طَآٮِٕفٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّكَ وَهُمۡ نَآٮِٕمُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: So there came upon it [i.e., the garden] an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep.
ayahs.transliteration: Fataafa 'alaihaa taaa'i-fum mir rabbika Wa-hum naaa'imoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَصْبَحَتْ كَٱلصَّرِيمِ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: And it became as though reaped.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَتَنَادَوْاْ مُصْبِحِينَ ٢١
ayahs.translation: And they called one another at morning,

ayahs.textUthmani: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰرِمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَنِ ٱغْدُواْ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰرِمِينَ ٢٢
ayahs.textIndopak: اَنِ اغۡدُوۡا عَلٰى حَرۡثِكُمۡ اِنۡ كُنۡتُمۡ صٰرِمِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: [Saying], "Go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit."
ayahs.transliteration: Anigh doo 'alaa harsikum in kuntum saarimeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱنطَلَقُواْ وَهُمْ يَتَخَـٰفَتُونَ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: So they set out, while lowering their voices,

ayahs.textUthmani: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌ ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اَنۡ لَّا يَدۡخُلَنَّهَا الۡيَوۡمَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ مِّسۡكِيۡنٌۙ‏
ayahs.translation: [Saying], "There will surely not enter it today upon you [any] poor person."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَغَدَوْاْ عَلَىٰ حَرْدٍ قَـٰدِرِينَ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: And they went early in determination, [assuming themselves] able.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهَا قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا لَضَآلُّونَ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: But when they saw it, they said, "Indeed, we are lost;

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ ٢٧
ayahs.translation: Rather, we have been deprived."

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ ٢٨
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ اَوۡسَطُهُمۡ اَلَمۡ اَقُلۡ لَّكُمۡ لَوۡلَا تُسَبِّحُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, 'Why do you not exalt [Allāh]?'"
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala awsatuhum alam aqul lakum law-laa tusabbihoon

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالُوۡا سُبۡحٰنَ رَبِّنَاۤ اِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaaloo subhaana rabbinaaa innaa kunnaa zaalimeen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَلَـٰوَمُونَ ٣٠
ayahs.translation: Then they approached one another, blaming each other.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا طَـٰغِينَ ٣١
ayahs.translation: They said, "O woe to us; indeed we were transgressors.

ayahs.textUthmani: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٲغِبُونَ ٣٢
ayahs.textIndopak: عَسٰى رَبُّنَاۤ اَنۡ يُّبۡدِلَـنَا خَيۡرًا مِّنۡهَاۤ اِنَّاۤ اِلٰى رَبِّنَا رٰغِبُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Perhaps our Lord will substitute for us [one] better than it. Indeed, we are toward our Lord desirous."
ayahs.transliteration: Asaa rabbunaaa any yubdilanaa khairam minhaaa innaaa ilaa rabbinaa raaghiboon

ayahs.textUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَٲلِكَ ٱلْعَذَابُ‌ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْأَخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ‌ۚ لَوْ كَانُواْ يَعْلَمُونَ ٣٣
ayahs.textIndopak: كَذٰلِكَ الۡعَذَابُ​ؕ وَلَعَذَابُ الۡاٰخِرَةِ اَكۡبَرُ ​ۘ لَوۡ كَانُوۡا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Such is the punishment [of this world]. And the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew.
ayahs.transliteration: Kazaalikal azaab, Wa-la'azaabul aakhirati akbar; law kaanoo ya'lamoon

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ ٣٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ عِنۡدَ رَبِّهِمۡ جَنّٰتِ النَّعِيۡمِ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, for the righteous with their Lord are the Gardens of Pleasure.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَنَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ كَٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ ٣٥
ayahs.translation: Then will We treat the Muslims like the criminals?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَا لَكُمْ كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ ٣٦
ayahs.translation: What is [the matter] with you? How do you judge?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَمْ لَكُمْ كِتَـٰبٌ فِيهِ تَدْرُسُونَ ٣٧
ayahs.translation: Or do you have a scripture in which you learn

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ لَكُمْ فِيهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُونَ ٣٨
ayahs.translation: That indeed for you is whatever you choose?

ayahs.textUthmani: أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَـٰنٌ عَلَيْنَا بَـٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۙ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَـٰنٌ عَلَيْنَا بَـٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ‌ۙ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ ٣٩
ayahs.textIndopak: اَمۡ لَـكُمۡ اَيۡمَانٌ عَلَيۡنَا بَالِغَةٌ اِلٰى يَوۡمِ الۡقِيٰمَةِ​ ۙ اِنَّ لَـكُمۡ لَمَا تَحۡكُمُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Or do you have oaths [binding] upon Us, extending until the Day of Resurrection, that indeed for you is whatever you judge?
ayahs.transliteration: Am lakum aymaanun 'alainaa baalighatun ilaa yawmil qiyaamati inna lakum lamaa tahkumoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَلْهُمْ أَيُّهُم بِذَٲلِكَ زَعِيمٌ ٤٠
ayahs.translation: Ask them which of them, for that [claim], is responsible.

ayahs.textUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُواْ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُواْ صَـٰدِقِينَ ٤١
ayahs.textIndopak: اَمۡ لَهُمۡ شُرَكَآءُ ۛۚ فَلۡيَاۡتُوۡا بِشُرَكَآٮِٕهِمۡ اِنۡ كَانُوۡا صٰدِقِيۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful.
ayahs.transliteration: Am lahum shurakaaa'u fal-ya'too bishurakaaa-'ihim in kaanoo saadiqeen

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ ٤٢
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ يُكۡشَفُ عَنۡ سَاقٍ وَّيُدۡعَوۡنَ اِلَى السُّجُوۡدِ فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيۡعُوۡنَۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: The Day the shin will be uncovered and they are invited to prostration but they [i.e., the disbelievers] will not be able,
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yukshafu 'am saaqinw Wa-yud'awna ilas sujoodi falaa yastatee'oon

ayahs.textUthmani: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا۟ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَـٰلِمُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ‌ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُواْ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَـٰلِمُونَ ٤٣
ayahs.textIndopak: خَاشِعَةً اَبۡصَارُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةٌ ؕ وَقَدۡ كَانُوۡا يُدۡعَوۡنَ اِلَى السُّجُوۡدِ وَهُمۡ سٰلِمُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. And they used to be invited to prostration while they were sound.
ayahs.transliteration: Khaashi'atan absaaruhum tarhaquhum zillatunw Wa-qad kaanoo yud'awna ilas sujoodi Wa-hum saalimoon

ayahs.textUthmani: فَذَرْنِى وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ ۖ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَذَرْنِى وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ‌ۖ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ ٤٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَذَرۡنِىۡ وَمَنۡ يُّكَذِّبُ بِهٰذَا الۡحَـدِيۡثِ​ؕ سَنَسۡتَدۡرِجُهُمۡ مِّنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا يَعۡلَمُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: So leave Me, [O Muḥammad], with [the matter of] whoever denies this statement [i.e., the Qur’ān]. We will progressively lead them [to punishment] from where they do not know.
ayahs.transliteration: Fazarnee Wa-many yukazzibu bihaazal hadeesi sanastad-rijuhum min haisu laa ya'lamoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأُمْلِى لَهُمْ‌ۚ إِنَّ كَيْدِى مَتِينٌ ٤٥
ayahs.translation: And I will give them time. Indeed, My plan is firm.

ayahs.textUthmani: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَمْ تَسْــَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ ٤٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اَمۡ تَسۡـَٔـلُهُمۡ اَجۡرًا فَهُمۡ مِّنۡ مَّغۡرَمٍ مُّثۡقَلُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Or do you ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
ayahs.transliteration: Am tas'aluhum ajran fahum min maghramin musqaloon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ ٤٧
ayahs.translation: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌ ٤٨
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُنۡ كَصَاحِبِ الۡحُوۡتِ​ۘ اِذۡ نَادٰى وَهُوَ مَكۡظُوۡمٌؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Then be patient for the decision of your Lord, [O Muḥammad], and be not like the companion of the fish [i.e., Jonah] when he called out while he was distressed.
ayahs.transliteration: Fasbir lihukmi rabbika Wa-laa takun kasaahibil hoot; iz naadaa Wa-huwa makzoom

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّوْلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّوْلَآ أَن تَدَٲرَكَهُۥ نِعْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌ ٤٩
ayahs.textIndopak: لَوۡلَاۤ اَنۡ تَدٰرَكَهٗ نِعۡمَةٌ مِّنۡ رَّبِّهٖ لَنُبِذَ بِالۡعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذۡمُوۡمٌ‏

words.translation: surely he would have been thrown

ayahs.translation: If not that a favor [i.e., mercy] from his Lord overtook him, he would have been thrown onto the naked shore while he was censured.
ayahs.transliteration: Law-laaa an tadaara-kahoo ni'matum mir rabbihee lanubiza bil'araaa'i Wa-huwa mazmoom

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ ٥٠
ayahs.translation: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَـٰرِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا۟ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَـٰرِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُواْ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجْنُونٌ ٥١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِنۡ يَّكَادُ الَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا لَيُزۡلِقُوۡنَكَ بِاَبۡصَارِهِمۡ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا الذِّكۡرَ وَيَقُوۡلُوۡنَ اِنَّهٗ لَمَجۡنُوۡنٌ​ۘ‏
ayahs.translation: And indeed, those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes [i.e., looks] when they hear the message, and they say, "Indeed, he is mad."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-iny yakaadul lazeena kafaroo la-yuzliqoonaka biabsaarihim lammaa sami'uz Zikra Wa-yaqooloona innahoo lamajnoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٥٢
ayahs.translation: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds.
